## Type of contribution

## Editorial checklist

- [ ] Entries follow the format in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] All claims are verifiable from a primary source (paper / advisory / canonical repo).
- [ ] No fabricated authors, venues, dates, or URLs.
- [ ] One-line entries — no marketing language.
- [ ] Sorted by year (most recent first) within the relevant subsection.
- [ ] For papers: corresponding entry added to `papers/papers.yml` and `papers/papers.bib`.

<!-- Anything reviewers should know — disputed venue placement, layer overlap, etc. -->
